content_fingerprint: openai codex cli gains unix socket transport expanded plugin management and deeper aws bedrock integration openai s flagship ai coding agent shipped version 0 125 0 with a substantive update to its app server integration layer adding unix socket transport improved plugin lifecycle management and tighter aws bedrock account state visibility for application clients openai has published version 0 125 0 of codex its command line coding agent featuring six new capabilities in the app server integration layer alongside several bug fixes the release dated april 24 2026 follows a rapid series of alpha
